sentences.base_language: I have a lot of feelings.
When the New York Jets win I feel happy.
sentences.target_language: 当纽约喷气机队赢的时候，我感到高兴。
sentences.romanized: dāng niǔyuē pēnqìjī duì yíng de shíhou, wǒ gǎndào gāoxìng.

sentences.base_language: When the New York Jets lose I feel sad.
sentences.target_language: 当纽约喷气机队输的时候，我感到难过。
sentences.romanized: dāng niǔyuē pēnqìjī duì shū de shíhou, wǒ gǎndào nánguò.

sentences.base_language: Watching the new york jets can make me feel a lot of things.
sentences.target_language: 看纽约喷气机队的比赛能让我感受到很多。
sentences.romanized: kàn niǔyuē pēnqìjī duì de bǐsài néng ràng wǒ gǎnshòu dào hěn duō.

sentences.base_language: Because it is not football season
sentences.target_language: 因为现在不是美式橄榄球赛季
sentences.romanized: yīnwèi xiànzài bú shì měishì gǎnlǎnqiú sàijì
